datasets.name: GPT-4 Prompt Engineering Collection
datasets.description: 10,000 curated prompts for GPT-4 and Claude optimized for production use cases including summarization, code generation, and reasoning chains.
preview: Summarize the following text in exactly 3 bullet points...
You are an expert software engineer. Review this code for bugs...
Generate a detailed product description for...

datasets.name: LLaMA Fine-tuning Corpus v2
datasets.description: 50,000 instruction-following pairs for fine-tuning open-source LLMs. Includes diverse domains: medical, legal, coding, and creative writing.
preview: Instruction: Explain quantum entanglement to a 10-year-old...
Instruction: Write a Python function that...
Instruction: Summarize this medical paper...

datasets.name: CLIP Vision Embeddings — 1M Images
datasets.description: Pre-computed CLIP embeddings for 1 million stock images. Ready to plug into your RAG pipeline or similarity search. Normalized float32 vectors.

datasets.name: RLHF Human Preference Dataset
datasets.description: 25,000 human-labeled preference pairs for RLHF training. Each pair includes chosen and rejected responses with detailed annotation notes.
preview: Prompt: Explain climate change...
Chosen: A clear, factual explanation...
Rejected: A vague, misleading response...

datasets.name: Code Completion Dataset — Python/JS/Rust
datasets.description: 100,000 code completion pairs across Python, JavaScript, and Rust. Sourced from open-source repos with permissive licenses. Perfect for Copilot-style models.
preview: def fibonacci(n: int) -> int:
# Complete this function

datasets.name: Medical Q&A Fine-tuning Set
datasets.description: 8,000 verified medical question-answer pairs reviewed by licensed physicians. Ideal for healthcare AI applications with strict accuracy requirements.
preview: Q: What are the symptoms of Type 2 diabetes?
A: Common symptoms include increased thirst...
Verified by: Dr. Sarah Chen, MD

datasets.name: Multilingual RAG Corpus — 40 Languages
datasets.description: 500,000 document chunks pre-processed for RAG pipelines across 40 languages. Includes metadata, source URLs, and chunk boundaries.
preview: chunk_id: 001, lang: en, text: The Eiffel Tower...
chunk_id: 002, lang: fr, text: La Tour Eiffel...
chunk_id: 003, lang: ja, text: エッフェル塔は...

datasets.name: Audio Transcription Training Set
datasets.description: 15,000 audio-text pairs for training speech recognition and transcription models. Covers 12 accents and 6 languages with noise augmentation.
preview: audio_id: 001, duration: 4.2s, transcript: Hello world...
audio_id: 002, duration: 8.1s, accent: British...
audio_id: 003, lang: Spanish, noise: 0.2dB...
